title: dolichos orbicularis
intro: Dolichos orbicularis, also known as the kidney bean tree, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dolichos orbicularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support kidney function. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion for herbal remedies, and can also be used as a poultice or applied topically for skin conditions.
